# Kopern — AI Agent Builder, Orchestrator & Grader

> Build, test, and deploy production-grade AI agents with tool calling, deterministic grading, multi-agent teams, and MCP server endpoints.

## What Kopern Does

Kopern is a web platform for creating custom AI agents that go beyond simple chatbots. Each agent can have:

- **System Prompt**: Core instructions defining behavior, role, and output format
- **Skills**: Markdown knowledge templates injected as XML into the agent's context
- **Custom Tools**: JSON Schema parameters + sandboxed JavaScript execution code — agents call these as functions
- **GitHub Integration**: Connect repos → agents get `read_file` + `search_files` tools + repo tree context
- **Extensions**: TypeScript lifecycle hooks for safety, logging, cost control (25+ event types)
- **Grading Suites**: Automated testing with 6 criterion types (output_match, schema_validation, tool_usage, safety_check, custom_script, llm_judge)
- **Purpose Gate**: Session-scoped question to focus agent behavior
- **TillDone Mode**: Multi-step task enforcement with auto-prompting
- **Branding**: Custom icons and colors per agent

## LLM Support

Multi-provider with native tool calling:
- Anthropic Claude (Opus 4.6, Sonnet 4.6, Haiku 4.5)
- OpenAI GPT (GPT-4o, GPT-4o-mini)
- Google Gemini (2.5 Flash)
- Ollama (local models)

## Orchestration

- **Agent Teams**: Parallel, sequential, or conditional execution of multiple agents
- **Pipelines**: Sequential chains where each step's output feeds the next
- **MCP Servers**: Expose any agent as a JSON-RPC endpoint with API key authentication (Model Context Protocol)

## Architecture

- Next.js 16 + React 19 + TypeScript
- Firebase (Firestore real-time, Auth)
- SSE streaming for all agent interactions
- Sandboxed tool execution (Node.js vm module)
- Real-time billing and usage tracking per agent

## Key Pages

- `/en` — Landing page with meta-agent creator (create an agent from a text prompt)
- `/en/examples` — Gallery of 15+ agent templates
- `/en/pricing` — 4 tiers (Starter free, Pro, Usage, Enterprise)
- `/en/docs` — Full documentation

## API

- `POST /api/agents/{id}/chat` — SSE streaming chat with tool calling
- `POST /api/agents/{id}/grading/{suiteId}/run` — Run grading suite
- `POST /api/teams/{id}/execute` — Execute agent team
- `POST /api/mcp` — MCP JSON-RPC endpoint
- All API routes support real-time token tracking and billing

## Languages

Available in English and French.
